title: rosa × braunii var. erasmi-iulii
intro: Rosa × braunii var. erasmi-iulii is a hybrid rose species, often referred to as a wild rose or Rosa × braunii subsp. erasmi-iulii, which is believed to be a natural hybrid of Rosa rubiginosa and Rosa glauca. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of salicylic acid, which has anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Rosa × braunii var. erasmi-iulii include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and combat infections, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Rosa × braunii var. erasmi-iulii is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in skincare products and topical applications due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
